description: Comprehensive Umrah and Haji booking application with user authentication, profile management, and package booking

tasks.title: Setup Project Repository

tasks.description: Design and setup database schema for users, packages, bookings, payments

tasks.description: Setup JWT tokens, session management, and security configurations

tasks.description: Integrate Google sign-in functionality

tasks.description: Setup secure file upload for KTP/Passport documents and payment proofs

tasks.description: Create registration form with validation and email verification

tasks.title: User Login System
tasks.description: Implement login form with email/password and remember me feature

tasks.title: Google Sign-in Integration
tasks.description: Complete Google OAuth implementation for seamless login

tasks.description: Create comprehensive profile management UI with all user details

tasks.title: ID Document Management

tasks.title: Password Management System

tasks.title: Bank Details Management
tasks.description: Add bank account information for refunds (bank name, account number, account name)

tasks.title: Package Types Implementation

tasks.title: Room Type System

tasks.description: Create multi-step booking process with progress indicator

tasks.title: Pilgrim Type Selection
tasks.description: Implement tipe jamaah selection with appropriate categorization

tasks.title: Booking Summary & Review
